title: Benchmark
description: Cross-company benchmark data enabling Compass to learn patterns and provide comparative insights.

benchmarkId.description: Unique identifier for this benchmark record

industry.description: Primary industry grouping for this benchmark cohort

subIndustry.description: More specific sub-industry or vertical within the primary industry

companySegment.description: Company size segment targeted by this benchmark

revenueStage.description: Funding or revenue maturity stage of companies in this cohort

sampleSize.description: Number of companies included in this benchmark cohort

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when this benchmark data was last refreshed

opportunityType.description: Type or category of opportunity commonly deployed in this cohort

department.description: Department where this deployment type is typically implemented

adoptionRate.description: Proportion of companies in the cohort that have adopted this deployment type

averageDifficulty.description: Average implementation difficulty rating for this deployment type

averageTimeToValue.description: Average time until value is realized from this deployment type

averageRoi.description: Average return on investment reported for this deployment type

successRate.description: Proportion of deployments of this type that met their success criteria

sampleCount.description: Number of deployments included in this benchmark calculation

evidence.description: Evidence supporting this common deployment benchmark data

items.description: Benchmark data for a commonly deployed opportunity type

commonDeployments.description: Deployment patterns most frequently observed across the cohort

pattern.description: Name or short description of this typical deployment pattern

description.description: Detailed explanation of this pattern and when it applies

frequency.description: How frequently this pattern is observed in the cohort

typicalPrerequisites.description: Typical prerequisites that should be in place before implementing this pattern

typicalDependencies.description: Typical dependencies that must be satisfied for this pattern to succeed

evidence.description: Evidence supporting this typical pattern observation

items.description: A typical deployment pattern commonly observed in the cohort

typicalPatterns.description: Typical deployment and adoption patterns observed across the cohort

kpiName.description: Name of the key performance indicator being benchmarked

department.description: Department associated with this KPI benchmark

p10.description: Value at the top 10th percentile representing top performers

p25.description: Value at the 25th percentile representing the top quartile

p75.description: Value at the 75th percentile representing the bottom quartile

p90.description: Value at the 90th percentile representing the bottom 10th percentile

unit.description: Unit of measurement for this KPI

source.description: Origin or data source for this benchmark value

evidence.description: Evidence supporting this KPI benchmark data

items.description: A single KPI benchmark with percentile distributions

kpiBenchmarks.description: Benchmark distributions for key performance indicators across the cohort

none.description: Percentage of companies with no AI adoption

experimental.description: Percentage of companies in experimental AI adoption phase

adopting.description: Percentage of companies actively adopting AI solutions

embedded.description: Percentage of companies with AI embedded across operations

leading.description: Percentage of companies at the leading edge of AI maturity

sampleSize.description: Number of companies included in this maturity distribution calculation

evidence.description: Evidence supporting the AI maturity distribution data

aiMaturityDistribution.description: Distribution of AI maturity levels across the cohort

failure.description: Description of the common failure or pitfall

frequency.description: How frequently this failure occurs in the cohort

rootCauses.description: Common root causes identified for this failure

mitigationStrategies.description: Strategies to mitigate or prevent this failure

evidence.description: Evidence supporting this common failure observation

items.description: A common failure pattern observed across the cohort

commonFailures.description: Common failure patterns and their mitigations observed across the cohort

recommendation.description: Recommended action or opportunity for this department

priorityScore.description: Priority score from 0 to 100 indicating how strongly this is recommended

sampleCount.description: Number of companies in the cohort that support this recommendation

items.description: A single prioritized recommendation for a department

byDepartment.description: Department-specific recommendations with priority scores and sample counts

version.description: Schema or data version of this benchmark record

confidence.description: Overall confidence level in the benchmark data quality

nextRefreshAt.description: Scheduled timestamp for the next refresh of this benchmark data

metadata.description: Metadata about the benchmark record itself

confidenceLevel.description: Confidence level indicating reliability of a piece of evidence

type.description: Classification of how this evidence was obtained

source.description: The origin or source of this evidence

detail.description: Detailed description of the evidence content

url.description: URL reference to the source of this evidence

confidence.description: Confidence level in this evidence item

evidenceItem.description: A single evidence item used across the Compass platform
